articles.title: Enormous solar power array seen from orbit | Space photo of the day for March 5, 2026
articles.summary: This stunning satellite image of Ouarzazate, Morocco, was taken by Europe's Copernicus Sentinel-2 mission.

articles.title: Ailing “Megaberg” Sparks Surge of Microscopic Life
articles.summary: As Iceberg A-23A disintegrated, it shed meltwater that helped fuel an extensive phytoplankton bloom in the South Atlantic Ocean.
